entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The crop species being studied for disease resistance

entities.name: FOLIAR BLAST DISEASE
entities.description: A biotic constraint caused by Magnaporthe grisea affecting pearl millet

entities.name: MAGNAPORTHE GRISEA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes foliar blast disease in pearl millet

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where foliar blast disease has emerged as an important constraint

entities.name: GENOTYPE-BY-ENVIRONMENT INTERACTION
entities.description: The interaction between genetic makeup and environmental factors influencing disease severity

entities.name: MULTI-ENVIRONMENT TESTING
entities.description: The process of screening genotypes across multiple environments to identify stable resistance

entities.name: NATURAL EPIPHYTOTIC CONDITIONS
entities.description: The environmental conditions under which the diversity panel was screened

entities.name: COMBINED ANOVA
entities.description: A statistical method used to analyze genotype-by-environment interaction

entities.name: CROSSOVER INTERACTION
entities.description: A type of interaction where the relative performance of genotypes changes across environments

entities.name: PRINCIPAL COMPONENT ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method used to account for total variance in blast scoring results

entities.name: HA-GGE BIPLOT
entities.description: Heritability-adjusted genotype plus genotype x environment interaction biplot used to identify ideal genotypes

entities.name: IP 11353
entities.description: An ideal pearl millet genotype with stable resistance and genetic buffering capacity

entities.name: IP 22423
entities.description: A desirable pearl millet genotype with stable resistance and genetic buffering capacity

entities.name: IP 7910
entities.description: A desirable pearl millet genotype with stable resistance and genetic buffering capacity

entities.name: IP 7941
entities.description: A desirable pearl millet genotype with stable resistance and genetic buffering capacity

entities.name: BOOTSTRAPPING
entities.description: A statistical method used to validate the recommendations of genotypes

entities.name: MEGA-ENVIRONMENT DELINEATION
entities.description: A method used to identify target environments for precise testing

entities.name: DESIRABILITY INDEX
entities.description: A method used to suggest the ideal environment for testing

entities.name: JAIPUR
entities.description: The ideal environment identified for precise testing of material against foliar blast disease

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE ASSOCIATION MAPPING
entities.description: A future method to be used for mapping foliar blast disease in pearl millet

entities.name: STABLE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a genotype to maintain resistance across different environments

entities.name: LATE MATURING
entities.description: A characteristic observed in most of the resistant pearl millet lines

entities.name: GENETIC BUFFERING CAPACITY
entities.description: The ability of a genotype to maintain performance despite environmental variation
